name: studio.update_content
description: Edit a single Actium Studio page's content and optionally publish it in one call (composes update_page + publish_page).
whenToUse: User asks to edit a specific page body (title, hero text, section copy) on an existing site.
Follow-up step after studio.scaffold_site when the generated content needs a targeted revision.
A content-ops workflow needs atomic 'edit + publish' without a separate publish approval hop.
whenNotToUse: Caller does not know the target page_id — call studio.site_status or studio.list_pages (when shipped) first.
Edit touches the site's navigation, theme, or global settings — use the dedicated navigation/theme/settings skills.
Operator wants a draft-only edit reviewed before publish — call update_page directly and leave publish:false, then gate studio.publish behind HITL approval.
